caption: A man wearing a grey traditional robe, glasses, and a patterned purple cap is speaking in an indoor setting. He is positioned against a bright, blurred background with hints of green foliage. The screen features several graphical overlays, including the "plustv" logo in the upper left and a purple banner that reads "PLUS POLITICS". A prominent white text banner across the center of the screen states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". At the bottom, a white bar provides viewing information, including "WATCH ON", "DStv CH 408", and "StarTimes CH 308". In the final frame, the bottom text changes to "WATCH ONLINE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a medium shot, gesturing slightly and speaking, while the on-screen graphics remain largely static until the final change to the website URL.
